## 💡 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

## 🛠 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. How should it integrate with the framework or tooling?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context, architecture diagrams, or reference patches.
